title: Checkbox Automation
excerpt: Change status when checkbox is checked.  Checking the checkbox is the trigger

posts.author: cyowell (Carrie Yowell)
posts.cookedHtml: Change status when checkbox is checked. Checking the checkbox is the trigger

posts.author: LPAlie (Louis-Pier)
posts.cookedHtml:
FYI, it is possible to do it with this app: Checklist for monday.

You can automatically change an item’s status when its checklist is complete. (see documentation)

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cyowell,

We recently launched the app Special Automations - monday.com App Marketplace which has the required automation recipe for your use case.

image1982×352 23.3 KB

Also if you want any other automation, do let us know at support@superworkday.com
